name: astro-sitemap-pro-component
description: Yoast/RankMath-style XML sitemaps: a sitemap index that splits into per-type sub-sitemaps, with hreflang alternates, lastmod, image entries and a localized XSL stylesheet. Framework-agnostic core with Astro & Next adapters. Dependency-free.
author: David Carrero Fernández-Baillo (https://carrero.es)
